Layout.name: FAT Chapter

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type) Or notDeveloper

SetProperty ( "level" ; 2) & SetProperty ( "server_mode" ; "Preview" ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; FAT Package::Export Package Sub Path ) & SetProperty ( "package_friendly_id" ; FAT Package::JSON Friendly id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type_name" ; FAT Package::Package type name )
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

SetProperty ( "fat_title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "funkis_cloud_title_id" ; FAT Title::Funkis Cloud Title id ) & SetProperty ( "title_environment" ; FAT Title::Title Environment )
FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
Not FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Chapter::Number of pages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Page::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
IsEmpty(FAT Page::Proxy type) And FAT Package::Scroll skip page level ≠ "OFF"
IsEmpty(FAT Page::Proxy type) And FAT Package::Scroll skip page level ≠ "OFF"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ "" Or FAT Package::Scroll skip page level = "true"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""

IsEmpty (FAT Page item::IO id Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item::IO id array Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT IO @ Page item::PrimaryKey) And IsEmpty (FAT IO @ List item @ PI::PrimaryKey) /*or not BlockTemplate @ Page item::IO enabled*/ Or FAT Page::Proxy type = ""

LayoutObject.name: Eye
Eye with stroke
Eye
Eye with stroke
Dim rect 2

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfTagValues = 0
IsEmpty ( FAT Score Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0
IsEmpty (FAT Score Condititon @ PI::PrimaryKey) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0
IsEmpty ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfTagValues = 0
IsEmpty ( FAT Score Value @ PI::PrimaryKey ) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreValues = 0
IsEmpty (FAT Score Condititon @ PI::PrimaryKey) And FAT List @ Page item::NumberOfScoreConditions = 0

LayoutObject.name: Dim Rect

Calculation.Text: FAT Page::Proxy type = "" Or Not SubtitleMedia ( Media PI 1::Container file extension )

ScriptReference.name: View card Page item IO setting

Calculation.Text: isEditor Or isTranslator Or FAT Page::Proxy type = "" Or (FAT Page::Proxy type ≠ "" Or FAT Package::Scroll skip page level = "true" And Not FAT Block @ Page item::IO enabled)

LayoutObject.name: Page item info

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 2)

LayoutObject.name: Page info
Page item info

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item::Media 2)

LayoutObject.name: Page info

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Page") & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Page::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; FAT Chapter::PrimaryKey) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_type" ; "Chapter" ) & SetProperty ( "item_level" ; 3 )

StyledText.Data: Total number of items in chapter: <<Number of pages>>

Calculation.Text: isEditor Or isTranslator Or Package type::Name ≠ "Slide"
"Create a new page in this chapter"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Package type::Name = "Slide"

StyledText.Data: <<ƒ:Case ( Package type::Name = "Slide"; "Add a slide block to this chapter"; "Add page to chapter" )>>

Calculation.Text: "Main menu image" & ¶ & Case ( Package type::Name = "Scroll"; "1X-size = 800*221 px, crop can be set"; Package type::Name = "Slide"; "1X-size = 222*222 px, no crop." )

StyledText.Data: <<Media Main Menu BG CH::Container original filename>> Width <<Media Main Menu BG CH::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media Main Menu BG CH::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media Main Menu BG CH::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (Media Main Menu BG CH::Media container)
IsEmpty (Media Main Menu BG CH::Media container)

LayoutObject.name: "Modifier Portal"

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Importance = 1 And PrivilegeAccess ( FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Privilege )

LayoutObject.name: Media filename 3
Media inout 3

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "Media" Or Not SubtitleMedia ( Media MV CH::Container file extension )
FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Chapter::ValuesList) < 3
FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "Value list radio" Or ValueCount ( FAT Modifier @ Chapter::ValuesList) > 2

StyledText.Data: <<FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Description>> Input type: <<FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type>> Access: <<FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Privilege>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "String" And FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "Prettified string" And FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "URL encoded string" And FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "Number" And FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "Sync server path"

SetProperty("title_id"; FAT Link MV @ Chapter::Title id) & SetProperty("link_type"; FAT Link MV @ Chapter::Link type) & SetProperty("item_id"; FAT Link MV @ Chapter::Internal Item id) & SetProperty("item_type"; FAT Link MV @ Chapter::Internal item type) & SetProperty("link_url"; FAT Link MV @ Chapter::Link ModifierValue)

"Link behaviour: " & FAT Link MV @ Chapter::Link behaviour & "¶" & "Item type: " & FAT Link MV @ Chapter::Internal item type & "¶" & "URL: " & FAT Link MV @ Chapter::Link ModifierValue & "¶" & "Click to follow link."
FAT Modifier @ Chapter::Type ≠ "Link" Or IsEmpty ( FAT ModifierValue @ Chapter::Value )

SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; "Chapter" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Chapter::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; FAT Chapter::Parent id ) & SetProperty ( "item_description" ; FAT Chapter::DisplayText ) & SetProperty ( "item_sortindex" ; FAT Chapter::SortIndex )
"Duplicate the current page item with all content and settings"

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Chapter" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Chapter::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; FAT Chapter::DisplayText & " - Link" )
"Create a link to this page item"
FAT Link @ Chapter::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator Or isEditor

SetProperty ( "title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; "Chapter" ) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Chapter::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "link_type" ; "Internal" ) & SetProperty ( "link_name" ; "Link to chapter " & FAT Chapter::DisplayText )
"Create a link to this page item"
Not FAT Link @ Chapter::PrimaryKey Or isTranslator
"Select for which IO context this tag should work in"
PatternCount (JSONGetElement ( FAT Tag Value @ CH::Tag Value JSON ; "valuelist_id" ) ; "funkis-cloud")
"How will this page item behave if the user doesn't have the tag active?"
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator

StyledText.Data: Edit navigation menu for this chapter
No navigation menu available for this package type

Calculation.Text: isEditor Or isTranslator Or Package type::Name ≠ "Slide"
"Explore blocks that can be added to this page"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Package type::Name ≠ "Slide"
"Add a new block to this page"
FAT Chapter::gBlock = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator Or Package type::Name ≠ "Slide"
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Page item" ) & SetProperty ( "view_block" ; FAT Page Block VL::PrimaryKey )
isEditor Or isTranslator Or Package type::Name ≠ "Slide"
"Main menu foreground image" & ¶ & Case ( Package type::Name = "Scroll"; "1X-size = 200*200 px"; Package type::Name = "Slide"; "1X-size = 222*222 px." )

StyledText.Data: <<Media Main Menu FG CH::Container original filename>> Width <<Media Main Menu FG CH::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media Main Menu FG CH::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media Main Menu FG CH::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (Media Main Menu FG CH::Media container)
IsEmpty (Media Main Menu FG CH::Media container)
"Main menu icon" & ¶ & Case ( Package type::Name = "Scroll"; "1X-size = 60*60 px"; Package type::Name = "Slide"; "1X-size = 100*100 px." )

StyledText.Data: <<Media Main Menu Icon CH::Container original filename>> Width <<Media Main Menu Icon CH::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media Main Menu Icon CH::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media Main Menu Icon CH::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (Media Main Menu Icon CH::Media container)
IsEmpty (Media Main Menu Icon CH::Media container)

StyledText.Data: IMPORTANT! To make interaction of this portal work in WebDirect: No grouped items in portal Text fields - such as media filename positioned in the bottom.
